title: Aurora Cannabis Reports Record Medical Revenue and Strong FY2025 Results
text: Aurora Cannabis announced exceptional fiscal 2025 performance highlighted by unprecedented medical cannabis achievements. Record annual global medical cannabis net revenue of $244.4 million (up 39% YoY), Record adjusted EBITDA of $49.7 million (261% YoY growth). Fourth quarter results showed total net revenue of $90.5 million (34% increase compared to prior year). Medical cannabis dominated revenue, contributing $67.8 million in Q4 (75% of total revenue) with impressive 70% gross margins. International markets more than doubled contribution, now representing 61% of global medical cannabis sales. Financial position: Aurora maintains robust balance sheet with $185.3 million of cash and debt-free cannabis business, providing substantial resources for growth initiatives. Company generated positive annual free cash flow of $9.9 million. Company identified accounting errors involving inventory calculations and lease obligations, though these were determined immaterial to prior financial statements. Consumer cannabis revenue declined 20% to $8.2 million as company prioritized higher-margin medical products. Forward outlook: Management expects slightly lower cannabis revenue in Q1 2026 due to temporary international market declines, though margins expected to remain strong with continued positive free cash flow generation.
